name: 比与比例
subject: math
curriculum_points:
C2.5 Equations Notes and examples
1 Construct simple expressions, equations and formulas. e.g. write an expression for a number that is 2 more than n.
Includes constructing linear simultaneous equations.
2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).
3 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two unknowns.

E2.5 Equations Notes and examples
1 Construct expressions, equations and formulas. e.g. write an expression for the product of two consecutive even numbers.
Includes constructing simultaneous equations.
2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).
3 Solve fractional equations with numerical and linear algebraic denominators. Examples include:
x
• = 4
2x + 1
2 3
• + = 1
x + 2 2x – 1
x 3
• = .
x + 2 x – 6
4 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two unknowns.
5 Solve simultaneous equations, involving one linear and one non-linear. With powers no higher than two.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「比与比例」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：C2.5 Equations Notes and examples
1 Construct simple expressions, equations and formulas. e.g. write an expression for a…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：E2.5 Equations Notes and examples
1 Construct expressions, equations and formula… 对理解「比与比例」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
